tab_id.description: Target tab. Defaults to the Agent Window's currently active tab.

timeout_ms.description: Hard upper bound on the wait; the extension also enforces its own AbortController hookup (M7 stops listening for further lifecycle events once exceeded). Defaults to 30s if omitted.

wait_until.description: Lifecycle phase to wait on. Defaults to [`WaitUntil::Load`].

WaitUntil.description:
Page-lifecycle checkpoint a navigation should wait on.

Mapping to CDP `Page.lifecycleEvent` names: * `Load` → `load` * `DomContentLoaded` → `DOMContentLoaded` * `NetworkIdle` → `networkIdle` * `Commit` → `commit` (earliest event after the navigation actually commits to a new document)
